title: Push Pop Bubble Fidget Sensory Toy, ABC Learning and Educational Toys, Poppers Fidget Toys, Stress Relief, Autism Sensory Toys [Numbers 1-30 on The Other Side | Letters & Addition Random]
features: 💖[Excellent Educational Toys]: This toy combines the letters A-Z with 1-30 digits, 1-10 addition calculations and 1-30 digits (printed on both sides), both sent at random. This is a great learning toy - very easy to read! It also helps children learn basic ABCs, spelling, numbers and addition calculations in a fun and easy way, helping them to memorise letters and numbers and expand their vocabulary.

💥[Push Pop Fit Toy]: You only need to press the mouse bubbles, and they will make a slight knocking sound, just like someone is knocking on the knuckles. It will not make noise or distract others. You are enjoying several hours of sensory exploration. Push the bubbles down and let them pass through the other side. Enjoy the satisfaction of the bubble packaging to reduce anxiet

🙌[Portable and Practical]: This toy measures 12.5*1.5*1.5cm/4.9*4.9*0.5 inches, suitable for most children and adults. It is also very practical. The letters and numbers printed on both sides as well as the numbers and addition calculations help to educate and teach as well as being fun. It makes learning easier and saves you money.

💎[High Quality Material]: This toy is made of 100% food grade silica gel without BPA. It is comfortable to touch, non-toxic, easy to clean, washable, and will not cause any harm to humans and pets. It can be repeatedly used and pressed for a long time.

🎁[Perfect Gift Choice]: This toy is a perfect gift choice for the elderly, children and adults. It can be used as a filling bag for candy bags, gifts, children's awards, birthday gifts for little girls, and also can be used for Christmas, Halloween, Carnival, theme parties, Thanksgiving, New Year or other special days, or just a surprise on ordinary days.
